prompt.positive:
A photorealistic image-to-video continuation of the provided frame. Start exactly from the front-facing close-up of a woman with wide eyes, clenched teeth, and both hands raised beside her face with fingers splayed. Preserve her identity, facial proportions, eye and mouth shape, teeth, both hand poses and finger count, tied-up hairstyle, striped shirt, soft indoor background, existing crop, composition, and aspect ratio.

The first frame already shows a held tense pose. During the clip, she maintains that pose while the visible tension makes one very small natural settle. By the final frames, her face and hands are completely still in essentially the same position. Only barely perceptible breathing supports the motion.

Keep the camera locked and the original composition stable. Preserve the full main subject and all key scene elements in frame. No zoom, orbit, pan, tilt or reframing.

Generate a single-shot video. Natural lighting and colors, realistic physics, coherent facial and hand anatomy, smooth temporal consistency, stable fine details, photorealistic motion.
prompt.negative: speaking, shouting, exaggerated expression, large head turn, hands leaving the pose or touching the face, changed identity or facial proportions, asymmetric eyes, altered mouth or teeth, deformed hands, extra or fused fingers, changed hairstyle or striped shirt, invented wind, zoom, orbit, reframing, crop, shake, flicker, morphing, duplication, motion artifacts, unfinished settling, cartoon or CGI look
